goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'worth house'.
Make sure you get 'price range'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 14:45'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time', 'train ID', and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
